speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] G'day beautiful people, and welcome to the ParkSyde Bright Side! I'm Alex Mercer, it's a stunning Wednesday April 15th, and I'm joined by the ever-radiant Jamie. Today we're kicking off with some absolutely brilliant news that'll make your heart soar!

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Too right, Alex! We've got incredible stories from around the globe today that prove humanity is absolutely smashing it. From massive ocean protection wins to mind-blowing science breakthroughs, plus our own Aussie athletes setting world records!

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And you know what the absolute star story is today? Scientists have discovered that keeping your brain active throughout life - reading, writing, learning new skills - could slash your Alzheimer's risk by a whopping 38%. That's the kind of news that makes you want to pick up that book or start that course you've been putting off!
